input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.2.4.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.2.4.4
            TITLE: the restrictor must be located to facilitate measurement during technical inspection

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.2.4.4: The restrictor must be located to facilitate measurement during Technical Inspection
IC.2.4.4 The restrictor must be located to facilitate measurement during Technical Inspection

final_answer: The restrictor must be located to facilitate measurement during Technical Inspection
